Notice Of Motion To Have Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David J. Streza, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Allied Barton Security Services LLC

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Allied Barton Security Services LLC's Motion to have request for admissions deemed admitted; request for monetary and terminating sanctions, granted in part, denied in part:
1. The request for admissions set for in defendant's request for admissions, set two, are deemed admitted;
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue against plaintiff in the sum of $540.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Request for terminating sanctions denied without prejudice.
Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
